{{Quote|I understand he makes the late and unlamented Jabba the Hutt look like a fine, upstanding citizen.|Mara Jade, on Chay Praysh|<ref name="Jade Solitaire">{{StoryCite|story=Jade Solitaire|book=Tales from the New Republic}}</ref>}}
'''Chay Praysh''' was a [[Drach'nam]] who controlled the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kvabja]] during the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Praysh himself did not live on Kvabja, residing instead on the planet [[Torpris]], headquarters of his [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]] consortium. He held a great hatred for [[Gender/Legends|females]], [[Human/Legends|Human]] females in particular.

He gave himself the title of ''"First Greatness,"'' and his subordinates were therefore known as ''"Greatnesses."'' His fortress on Torpris was guarded by creatures known as [[krizar]], as well as his Drach'nam followers. His operations were eventually discovered by [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], who was briefly captured by Praysh but managed to escape with the help of [[H'sishi/Legends|H'sishi]]. Praysh managed to escape Torpris but was later apprehended when the New Republic and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] came to free his slaves.
